_comment: Runtime identifiers for InsideDesk plugins. Copy this file to 'insidedesk.local.json' (gitignored) and fill in the REAL values. Skills and scripts resolve placeholders like <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID> from the local file at runtime; the public source carries placeholders only. None of these are secrets (API tokens/keys live in AWS Secrets Manager / macOS Keychain via the get-secret skill) — these are non-secret operational identifiers kept out of the public source.
